series_metadata.series_description: This record series includes correspondence, research, information and materials to support the efforts of the career technical planning district (CTPD), which demonstrates effective, sustainable, and coordinated educational programs for approved career fields and course offerings.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain five (5) years, then contact State Archives for review and possible transfer. Dispose of if not transferred. ; Electronic: Retain five (5) years, then contact State Archives for review and possible transfer. Dispose of if not transferred., Paper: Archives ; Electronic: Archives
